goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 provisional memory candidate dry-run 入口

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 memory candidate dry-run 入口
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/memory-candidates.ts 只读 CLI/函数，从已打分的低分或过宽 persisted prediction 中生成 provisional memory candidate 草案，并把输出明确分成 user-prior-candidate、trial-heuristic、prediction-eval。新增 focused tests 覆盖 user-prior dry-run、不改 memory audit、过宽 prediction 留在 eval、app sequence 留在 trial heuristic、缺表时不创建 Catty 表；README 增加入口说明并更新 Spike D 状态。
summary.why: 前序切片已经有真实 trail、shadow prediction 持久化、judge writeback 和 persisted daily report。要继续靠真实 miss 推进 memory admission，但不能把 prediction/judgement 直接写成用户记忆，所以本轮先做一个可审计、无副作用的 candidate dry-run 面，把哪些东西可能是 user prior、哪些只是提分 shortcut 或 eval 数据先分清。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 provisional memory candidate dry-run 入口

decisions.chose: 只做 memory candidate dry-run，不写用户 memory、不写 catty_memory_audit、不接 heartbeat。
decisions.rationale: v0 需要先从 judged misses 学到可审计候选，但 prediction/judgement 仍是评估数据；直接写 memory 会污染 admission 和 canary 边界。

decisions.chose: 输出 user-prior-candidate、trial-heuristic、prediction-eval 三类，并复用 admitMemoryCandidate 作为 admission preview。
decisions.rationale: 这把真正可证伪 user prior、app/domain shortcut 和过宽/弱可证伪 prediction eval 分开，符合 Catty v0 anti-drift charter。

decisions.chose: 只读 SqliteCattyStore 的 catty_predictions，缺表返回空结果且不建表。
decisions.rationale: memory-candidates 是观察/反省前置面，不应在 live smoke 或 dry-run 时留下 DB side effect。

decisions.chose: 把 int_5b87e237、int_d0d9d89f、int_89989c5b、int_2dd4c8cc、int_d2f08a4a、int_22f3a69f、int_7d4c2855 视为同一 Catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 它们分别完成 trail、judge seam、runtime、store、shadow CLI、judge-record 和 report；本轮在这些基础上补 Spike D 的 dry-run 候选入口，不反向改变其核心决策。

rejected.alternative: 直接把 candidate 写入用户长期 memory
rejected.reason: 会把评估数据当成已证实 user prior，跳过 v0 要求的 admission / future canary / dogfood 边界。

rejected.alternative: 把 app/domain 序列也作为 accepted memory 输出
rejected.reason: app shortcut 只能作为 trial heuristic；否则会把 hit-rate shortcut 当成更像用户本人。

rejected.alternative: 在 CLI 中重新设计持久表或写入 audit
rejected.reason: 本轮只需要 dry-run 生成和分类；持久 audit/canary 应作为后续独立切片处理。

review_notes: TDD RED：bun test src/catty/memory-candidates.test.ts 先失败于缺少 ./memory-candidates 模块。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/memory-candidates.test.ts，4 pass，18 expect。
验证通过：Catty focused tests，14 pass，89 expect。
验证通过：bun test，25 pass，126 expect。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 无输出。
CLI smoke：bun src/catty/memory-candidates.ts --help 输出预期 usage。
live read-only smoke：bun src/catty/memory-candidates.ts --date 2026-05-27 返回 0 drafts，没有写 live DB。
临时 SQLite 非空 CLI smoke：返回 1 个 user-prior-candidate，summary.userPriorCandidates=1。
提交 715d298 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/memory-candidates.ts、src/catty/memory-candidates.test.ts；worktree 仍有既有无关 CLAUDE.md dirty，未 stage、未提交。

subsystems: Catty v0 provisional memory candidate dry-run
architectural_claims: Catty v0 can now turn judged misses into provisional memory candidate drafts without writing user memory.
Candidate generation keeps prediction eval data, trial heuristics, and accepted user-prior candidates separate.
The dry-run reuses the existing admitMemoryCandidate gate so app/domain shortcuts remain rejected trial heuristics.
The command reads persisted prediction/judgement state but performs no model calls and no DB writes.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/memory-candidates.ts emits dry-run JSON for the current UTC date by default.
--date filters judged predictions by createdAt day; --store-db selects the SQLite store; --max caps output count.
Low-overall judged misses produce user-prior-candidate drafts when they pass admission preview.
High-vagueness misses are kept as prediction-eval with no candidate object.
App/domain shortcut candidates are emitted as trial-heuristic with rejected admission.
Missing catty_predictions returns empty drafts without creating Catty tables.
security_implications: memory-candidates.ts reads only Catty prediction tables and does not read ~/.agents/memory/config.json, payload_json, API keys, cookies, or provider env vars.
The command has no --pi path and performs no model calls.
The command is dry-run only; --write is rejected and no user memory or Catty audit state is written.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; the command reads existing SqliteCattyStore tables when present.
Existing shadow, judge-record, report, runtime, and store APIs are unchanged.
